calendar.matters:
Notice And Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Nov-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is granted, except for $50 per pay period. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
